from api.models import Imagen, ImagenCitologia, ImagenNecropsia, ImagenTubo, ImagenHematologia, ImagenMicrobiologia, InformeResultado

models = [
    \('Imagen', Imagen\),
    \('ImagenCitologia', ImagenCitologia\),
    \('ImagenNecropsia', ImagenNecropsia\),
    \('ImagenTubo', ImagenTubo\),
    \('ImagenHematologia', ImagenHematologia\),
    \('ImagenMicrobiologia', ImagenMicrobiologia\),
    \('InformeResultado', InformeResultado\),
]

for name, Model in models:
    total = Model.objects.count\(\)
    con_datos = 0
    rutas_legacy = 0
    vacias = 0
    for obj in Model.objects.all\(\):
        raw = obj.imagen
        if raw is None:
            vacias += 1
            continue
        if isinstance\(raw, memoryview\):
            raw = raw.tobytes\(\)
        if not raw:
            vacias += 1
            continue
        try:
            text = raw.decode\('utf-8', errors='strict'\)
            if '/' in text:
                rutas_legacy += 1
                print\(f'  {name} pk={obj.pk}: ruta legacy -> {text}'\)
                continue
        except:
            pass
        con_datos += 1
    print\(f'{name}: total={total}, binarios_ok={con_datos}, rutas_legacy={rutas_legacy}, vacias={vacias}'\)
" 2>&1)

m = MuestraCitologia.objects.filter\(pk=7\).first\(\)

        raw = img.imagen
        if isinstance\(raw, memoryview\): raw = raw.tobytes\(\)

Bash(source /home/jl/Escritorio/PYTHON-SANIDAD/DjangoSanidad/venv/bin/activate && python manage.py shell -c "
import os
from django.conf import settings
from api.models import Imagen, ImagenCitologia, ImagenNecropsia, ImagenTubo, ImagenHematologia, ImagenMicrobiologia, InformeResultado
from api.models import Cassette, Citologia, Necropsia, Hematologia, Tubo, Microbiologia

IMAGE_MAGIC = [b'\\xff\\xd8\\xff', b'\\x89PNG', b'GIF8', b'BM', b'RIFF', b'%PDF', b'PK\\x03\\x04', b'\\xd0\\xcf\\x11\\xe0']
media_root = settings.MEDIA_ROOT

def fix_model\(Model, field\):
    fixed = skipped = missing = 0
    for obj in Model.objects.all\(\):
        raw = getattr\(obj, field, None\)
        if raw is None: continue
        if isinstance\(raw, memoryview\): raw = raw.tobytes\(\)
        if not raw: continue
        if any\(raw.startswith\(m\) for m in IMAGE_MAGIC\): continue
        try:
            path_str = raw.decode\('utf-8', errors='strict'\).strip\(\)
        except: continue
        if '/' not in path_str: continue
        full_path = os.path.join\(media_root, path_str\)
        if not os.path.isfile\(full_path\):
            print\(f'  FALTA archivo: {full_path}'\)
            missing += 1
            continue
        with open\(full_path, 'rb'\) as f:
            content = f.read\(\)
        setattr\(obj, field, content\)
        obj.save\(update_fields=[field]\)
        print\(f'  OK: {Model.__name__} pk={obj.pk} {field} <- {path_str} \({len\(content\)} bytes\)'\)
        fixed += 1
    return fixed, missing

for Model, field in [
    \(Imagen,'imagen'\), \(ImagenCitologia,'imagen'\), \(ImagenNecropsia,'imagen'\),
    \(ImagenTubo,'imagen'\), \(ImagenHematologia,'imagen'\), \(ImagenMicrobiologia,'imagen'\),
    \(InformeResultado,'imagen'\), \(Cassette,'informe_imagen'\), \(Cassette,'volante_peticion'\),
    \(Citologia,'volante_peticion'\), \(Necropsia,'volante_peticion'\),
    \(Hematologia,'informe_imagen'\), \(Hematologia,'volante_peticion'\),
    \(Tubo,'informe_imagen'\), \(Tubo,'volante_peticion'\),
    \(Microbiologia,'informe_imagen'\), \(Microbiologia,'volante_peticion'\),
]:
    f, m = fix_model\(Model, field\)
    if f or m: print\(f'{Model.__name__}.{field}: fixed={f}, missing={m}'\)
print\('Listo.'\)
" 2>&1 | grep -v "imported")

Bash(source /home/jl/Escritorio/PYTHON-SANIDAD/DjangoSanidad/venv/bin/activate && python manage.py shell -c "
import os
from django.conf import settings
from api.models import Imagen, ImagenCitologia, ImagenNecropsia, ImagenTubo, ImagenHematologia, ImagenMicrobiologia, InformeResultado
from api.models import Cassette, Citologia, Necropsia, Hematologia, Tubo, Microbiologia

IMAGE_MAGIC = [b'\\xff\\xd8\\xff', b'\\x89PNG', b'GIF8', b'BM', b'RIFF', b'%PDF', b'PK\\x03\\x04', b'\\xd0\\xcf\\x11\\xe0']
media_root = settings.MEDIA_ROOT

def to_bytes\(raw\):
    if raw is None: return None
    if isinstance\(raw, memoryview\): return raw.tobytes\(\)
    if isinstance\(raw, \(bytes, bytearray\)\): return bytes\(raw\)
    if isinstance\(raw, str\): return raw.encode\('utf-8'\)
    return None

def fix_model\(Model, field\):
    fixed = missing = 0
    for obj in Model.objects.all\(\):
        raw = to_bytes\(getattr\(obj, field, None\)\)
        if not raw: continue
        if any\(raw.startswith\(m\) for m in IMAGE_MAGIC\): continue
        try:
            path_str = raw.decode\('utf-8', errors='strict'\).strip\(\)
        except: continue
        if '/' not in path_str: continue
        full_path = os.path.join\(media_root, path_str\)
        if not os.path.isfile\(full_path\):
            print\(f'  FALTA: {path_str}'\)
            missing += 1
            continue
        with open\(full_path, 'rb'\) as f:
            content = f.read\(\)
        setattr\(obj, field, content\)
        obj.save\(update_fields=[field]\)
        print\(f'  OK: {Model.__name__} pk={obj.pk} <- {path_str} \({len\(content\)} bytes\)'\)
        fixed += 1
    return fixed, missing

pairs = [
    \(Imagen,'imagen'\), \(ImagenCitologia,'imagen'\), \(ImagenNecropsia,'imagen'\),
    \(ImagenTubo,'imagen'\), \(ImagenHematologia,'imagen'\), \(ImagenMicrobiologia,'imagen'\),
    \(InformeResultado,'imagen'\), \(Cassette,'informe_imagen'\), \(Cassette,'volante_peticion'\),
    \(Citologia,'volante_peticion'\), \(Necropsia,'volante_peticion'\),
    \(Hematologia,'informe_imagen'\), \(Hematologia,'volante_peticion'\),
    \(Tubo,'informe_imagen'\), \(Tubo,'volante_peticion'\),
    \(Microbiologia,'informe_imagen'\), \(Microbiologia,'volante_peticion'\),
]
for Model, field in pairs:
    f, m = fix_model\(Model, field\)
    if f or m: print\(f'{Model.__name__}.{field}: fixed={f}, missing={m}'\)
print\('Listo.'\)
" 2>&1 | grep -v "imported")
